allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add SCUMM-style presentation with autoplay, updated dialogue, and final slide links

Includes full 42-scene adventure game presentation with 14 room templates,
CSS pixel-art sprites, typewriter dialogue, and transition system \(iris, wipe,
fade, walk\). Adds 12-minute autoplay mode with play/pause button in verb bar,
skip-from-title behavior, and absolute timing for equal scene allocation.
Updates KRZ scenes to emphasize cycles of worker displacement, end-of-world
scenes to foreground AI as a platform shift, and fixes Epstein phrasing.
Adds anastasiasalter.net and distantcoding.ai links to the final slide.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
Bash(python -c "from PIL import Image; print\('PIL available'\)" 2>/dev/null || python3 -c "from PIL import Image; print\('PIL available'\)" 2>/dev/null || echo "Need to install Pillow")
